hypothesis: Hypothesis: Incorporating explicit hydrogen bonding descriptors derived from DFT calculations into polymer embeddings will improve Bayesian optimization performance for CO2 adsorption capacity prediction by 30% compared to pre-trained molecular representations alone, particularly under low initial data quality (γ < 0.3), because such descriptors directly encode the amine-CO2 and amine-H2O interaction strengths that govern adsorption but are underrepresented in general chemical language models.
